title: Fix stuck body pointer-events after closing score-version action dialogs

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Root-cause hypothesis: Radix DropdownMenu (modal default true) + launching Dialog from menu item can leave body style pointer-events:none when layers teardown out of order. Investigating shared dropdown wrapper to disable modal behavior for these menus.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Refactored dashboard dropdown usage to shared wrapper for consistency and centralized defaults. Migrated raw Radix dropdowns in ItemCard, ScorecardDetailView, ScoreResultCard, ScorecardComponent, and FileAttachments to @/components/ui/dropdown-menu; removed leftover raw dropdown imports in score-component and item-component. Validation: npm run typecheck (dashboard) passes.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Manual validation complete: score/version actions and other modal-opening buttons no longer leave the page non-interactable after close. Preparing commit + PR to develop.
